channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HITECH] Hi-Tech Pipes: QIP Proceeds Utilization Report for Mar 2026
item.description:
Hi-Tech Pipes Ltd submitted a Monitoring Agency Report regarding the utilization of Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) proceeds for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report, issued by CRISIL Ratings Limited, confirms that during the reported quarter, the company redeemed its mutual fund investments and utilized the funds towards the objects of the issue as outlined in the Offer Document. A previous investment in an equity mutual fund was flagged for not aligning with the disclosures in the Offer Document due to inherent risks.

  • Hi-Tech Pipes reports on QIP proceeds utilization for quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • CRISIL Ratings Limited issued the Monitoring Agency Report.
  • Company redeemed mutual fund investments and utilized funds as intended.
  • Prior investment in equity mutual fund flagged for misalignment with Offer Document disclosures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hi-Tech Pipes Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [MFL] Epigral Ltd: Record Date for Dividend Set as June 1, 2026
item.description:
Epigral Ltd has announced the record date for the purpose of the 19th Annual General Meeting (AGM) and payment of dividend, if declared, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The record date is set for Monday, June 01, 2026. The AGM is scheduled for Monday, June 8, 2026, and will be held through Video Conferencing / Other Audio Visual Means.

  • Epigral Ltd sets June 1, 2026, as the record date for dividend.
  • The dividend is subject to declaration by members at the AGM.
  • 19th AGM scheduled for June 8, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • AGM pertains to the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Equity shares of ₹10/- per share are eligible for the dividend.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meghmani Finechem Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SHARP] Sharp India Ltd: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sharp India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, in a meeting held on May 14, 2026. The auditor's report from G.D. Apte & Co. indicates an unmodified opinion. However, the company's financial results have been prepared under a 'not going concern' basis due to no production activity since FY 2015-16, losses, and erosion in net worth. Borrowings from related parties were reinstated at settlement value, resulting in an additional charge of ₹216.87 Lakhs.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board on May 14, 2026.
  • Auditor's report by G.D. Apte & Co. with unmodified opinion.
  • Financial results prepared under 'not going concern' basis.
  • No production activity since FY 2015-16, leading to losses.
  • ₹216.87 Lakhs charge due to reinstatement of related party borrowings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHARP INDIA LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PNGSREVA] PNGS Reva: CARE Ratings Issues Monitoring Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
CARE Ratings Limited issued a Monitoring Agency Report for PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of proceeds from the company's Public Issue of equity shares. The report, in compliance with SEBI regulations, indicates no deviation from the stated objectives of the issue. As of March 31, 2026, ₹12,352 was temporarily held by HDFC Bank due to a complaint but was later released on April 9, 2026.

  • CARE Ratings issued a monitoring report for PNGS Reva's IPO proceeds for Q4 FY26.
  • The report confirms no deviation from the stated objectives of the public issue.
  • ₹379.51 crore was raised through the IPO, with a temporary hold on ₹12,352.
  • The held amount was released on April 9, 2026.
  • The report is available on the company's website as per regulatory requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [WEPSOLN] WEP Solutions Receives Favorable Order; ₹4.25 Cr Demand Set Aside
item.description:
WEP Solutions Ltd (WEPSOLN) has received a favorable order from the Customs, Central Excise and Service Tax Appellate Tribunal, Bangalore. The appellate order relates to a demand for service tax for the period April 2011 to June 2012 under the category of Supply of Tangible Goods. The order has set aside the entire demand comprising of service tax of ₹4,25,14,108 along with applicable interest and penalty. The amount is shown as a contingent liability in the company's financials. There is no impact on financial, operation or other activities of the listed entity.

  • WEP Solutions receives favorable order from CESTAT, Bangalore.
  • Appellate order sets aside service tax demand of ₹4.25 Cr.
  • Demand related to Supply of Tangible Goods from April 2011 to June 2012.
  • No impact on financial or operational activities; amount shown as contingent liability.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WEP SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [SIYARAM] Siyaram Recycling Secures ₹4.46 Cr Order
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Siyaram Recycling Industries Ltd has secured an order worth ₹4,45,87,480 from Anurag Impex for Brass Scrap Honey. The order is domestic and fixed cost, to be executed within 7 days. This transaction does not fall within related party transactions.

  • Siyaram Recycling secures order from Anurag Impex for Brass Scrap Honey.
  • The total order value is ₹4,45,87,480.
  • The order is domestic and of fixed cost nature.
  • The order execution period is within 7 days.
  • The transaction is not a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Siyaram Recycling Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [BAMBINO] Bambino Agro: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Bambino Agro Industries Ltd's Board approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, in a meeting held on May 14, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Kothapalli Srinivasa Rao as an Executive Director - Sales & Administration and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company w.e.f June 11, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The meeting commenced at 10:10 a.m. and concluded at 11:20 a.m.

  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 approved by the board.
  • Kothapalli Srinivasa Rao re-appointed as Executive Director, effective June 11, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.
  • The company reported revenue from operations of ₹39367.92 lacs for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The meeting of the Board of Directors commenced at 10:10 a.m. and concluded at 11:20 a.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAMBINO AGRO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade Appoints Abhishek Suresh Kyal as Additional Director
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd has appointed Mr. Abhishek Suresh Kyal (DIN: 08184639) as an Additional Director in an Independent capacity, effective May 11, 2026. The appointment follows a recommendation from the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Kyal will also serve as a member of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee. He brings 20 years of experience in real estate and digital marketing. Mr. Kyal is not related to any existing directors and is not debarred from holding office.

  • Abhishek Suresh Kyal appointed as Additional Independent Director effective May 11, 2026.
  • Kyal also appointed as a member of Nomination & Remuneration Committee.
  • Kyal has 20 years of experience in real estate and digital marketing.
  • Appointment follows recommendation of Nomination and Remuneration Committee.
  • Kyal is not related to any director and not debarred from holding office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [IXIGO] Le Travenues Tech: Monitoring Agency Report for Mar 2026
item.description:
Le Travenues Technology Ltd (IXIGO) has released Monitoring Agency Reports for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 32 of SEBI guidelines. ICRA Limited and CARE Ratings Limited issued the reports for funds raised through the IPO and Preferential Issue, respectively. ICRA's report indicates no material deviation in the utilization of IPO proceeds. The reports were reviewed by the Audit Committee and board of directors.

  • Monitoring Agency Reports for Q4 FY26 released as per SEBI regulations.
  • ICRA Limited monitored IPO proceeds with no material deviation noted.
  • CARE Ratings Limited monitored funds raised through Preferential Issue.
  • Reports reviewed by the Audit Committee and board of directors.
  • ICRA monitored ₹120.000 crore in Q4 FY2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Le Travenues Technology Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [BLS] BLS Board Meeting on May 19, 2026 to Consider Results, Dividend
item.description:
BLS International Services Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 19, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider approving a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26, if any. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the results are made public.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 19, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY 2025-26 is on the agenda.
  • Trading window closed since April 1, 2026, will reopen after results announcement.
  • Meeting will cover both standalone and consolidated financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLS International Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
